title: Investors Race To Buy 9 Dividend Stocks That Are Still Paying Off
text: S&P 500 investors still like dividend stocks. But, they're being much pickier about them this year.

title: International Paper Stock is Printing Profits Again
text: Global packaging and paper products giant International Paper Co. (NYSE: IP) stock is staging a rally off post-pandemic lows. The Company produces paper products in two segments, International Packaging and Global Cellulose Fibers.

title: International Paper: Solid Q4 Results
text: IP sold ILIM to its JV partner. It recorded $533 million in impairments. Solid Q4 performance supported by price increases.

title: Compared to Estimates, International Paper (IP) Q4 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: Although the revenue and EPS for International Paper (IP) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended December 2022, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.
